---
title: "Is-RSA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
install.packages("pheatmap")
library(pheatmap)

```

# IS-RSA 실습

## CSV 파일 불러오기

```{r}
csv_path <- "C:/Users/USER/Desktop/analysis_practice/roi_ts/roi_timeseries.csv"
dat <- read.csv(csv_path, check.names = FALSE)

# subjects x timepoints
X <- t(as.matrix(dat[, -1]))
rownames(X) <- colnames(dat)[-1]

dim(X)          # 기대: 16 x 300 (혹은 13~16 x 300)
X[1, 1:5]
```

## 뇌 유사도 행렬 만들기

```{r}
# brain similarity matrix (14 x 14)
brain_sim <- cor(t(X), method = "pearson")
diag(brain_sim) <- 1

dim(brain_sim)
brain_sim[1:5, 1:5]
```

## 행동유사도 만들기

```{r}
set.seed(42)
n_subj <- nrow(X)
beh <- rnorm(n_subj, mean = 0, sd = 1)
beh_dist <- as.matrix(dist(beh, method = "euclidean"))
beh_sim <- 1 - (beh_dist / max(beh_dist))
diag(beh_sim) <- 1

```

## IS-RSA 계산

```{r}
# upper triangle index
upper_idx <- upper.tri(brain_sim, diag = FALSE)

brain_vec <- brain_sim[upper_idx]
beh_vec   <- beh_sim[upper_idx]

# Spearman correlation
isrsa_r <- cor(brain_vec, beh_vec, method = "spearman")

isrsa_r
```

## Premutation null

```{r}
n_perm <- 10000
perm_r <- numeric(n_perm)

for (p in seq_len(n_perm)) {

  perm_beh <- sample(beh)

  perm_dist <- as.matrix(dist(perm_beh))
  perm_sim  <- 1 - (perm_dist / max(perm_dist))
  diag(perm_sim) <- 1

  perm_r[p] <- cor(
    brain_vec,
    perm_sim[upper_idx],
    method = "spearman"
  )
}

# p-value
p_val <- (sum(abs(perm_r) >= abs(isrsa_r)) + 1) / (n_perm + 1)

p_val

```

## 시각화

### 뇌 유사도 행렬

```{r}
library(pheatmap)

pheatmap(
  brain_sim,
  main = "Brain Similarity Matrix",
  clustering_distance_rows = "euclidean",
  clustering_distance_cols = "euclidean"
)

```

### 헹동 유사도 행렬

```{r}
pheatmap(
  beh_sim,
  main = "Behavior Similarity Matrix"
)

```

### 두 행렬의 Scatter plot

```{r}
plot(
  brain_vec,
  beh_vec,
  xlab = "Brain similarity",
  ylab = "Behavior similarity",
  main = "IS-RSA",
  pch = 19
)

abline(lm(beh_vec ~ brain_vec), col = "red", lwd = 2)
```

```{r}
hist(
  perm_r,
  breaks = 50,
  main = "Permutation null distribution",
  xlab = "Correlation"
)

abline(v = isrsa_r, col = "red", lwd = 3)
```
